title: At the Café
description: Learn how to order drinks and food at a Dutch café.

content.text: Welcome! In this lesson, you will learn how to order at a Dutch café ('het café'). The Dutch love their coffee and 'gezelligheid' (coziness)!

content.title: Polite Requests with 'Mag ik...?'
content.explanation:
Use 'Mag ik...?' to make polite requests. It literally means 'May I...?'

Mag ik de menukaart? = May I have the menu?
Mag ik een koffie? = May I have a coffee?

This is slightly more polite than 'Ik wil graag...' (I would like...) which you learned in Lesson 1. Both are perfectly fine to use!

content.title: Quick Practice: Order a Drink
content.expected_concept: The user should greet back and order a drink using 'Mag ik...' or 'Ik wil graag...' followed by a drink (een koffie, een thee, een water, een bier), optionally adding 'met melk' or 'met suiker'

content.title: Ordering a Drink
content.setting: You sit down at a cozy Dutch café. A waiter greets you.

conversation_flow.title: Greet and ask for the menu

data.meaning: I will take... / I will have...
I will have the apple pie.

content.title: Quick Practice: Order Food
content.bot_line: De appeltaart? Het broodje kaas? De bitterballen?
content.expected_concept: The user should order food using 'Ik neem...' or 'Ik wil graag...' followed by a food item (de appeltaart, het broodje kaas, de bitterballen)

content.title: Ordering Food
content.setting: You have your drink. The waiter comes back to ask about food.

conversation_flow.title: Order apple pie or another food item
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: Hallo! De appeltaart? Het broodje kaas? De bitterballen?

conversation_flow.title: Say yes or no to a drink with your food
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: De appeltaart. Met koffie? Met thee?

content.title: Paying and Leaving
content.setting: You have finished your coffee and apple pie. Time to pay and leave.

conversation_flow.title: Say the food was very tasty
Ask for the bill using 'Mag ik de rekening?'
Say 'Dank u wel!' and 'Tot ziens!'
conversation_flow.chatbot_message: De rekening. Dat is acht euro. Dank u wel! Tot ziens!

content.text: Lekker gedaan! You can now order drinks and food at a Dutch café and ask for the bill. In the next lesson, we will learn how to ask for directions!
